name: Standard
title: Violin Tuner
description: Free online violin tuner. Tune your violin to standard G-D-A-E using your microphone.

faq.question: What is standard violin tuning?
faq.answer: Standard violin tuning is G-D-A-E from the lowest (4th) string to the highest (1st) string, tuned in perfect fifths.

faq.question: How do I tune a violin online?
faq.answer: Bow or pluck each string near your device's microphone and adjust the fine tuners or pegs until the note matches.

faq.question: Can I tune a violin with a microphone?
faq.answer: Yes, our online violin tuner uses your device's microphone to detect pitch accurately for each string.
